text: Chessprogramming wiki Main Page From Chessprogramming wiki Jump to: navigation , search The Chess Programming Wiki is a repository of information about programming computers to play chess . Our goal is to provide a reference for every aspect of chess programming, information about programmers , researcher and engines . You'll find different ways to implement LMR and bitboard stuff like best magics for most dense magic bitboard tables. For didactic purposes, the CPW-Engine has been developed by some wiki members. You can start browsing using the left-hand navigation bar. All of our content is arranged hierarchically, so you can see every page by following just those links. If you are looking for a specific page or catchword you can use the search box on top. CPW was founded by Mark Lefler on October 26, 2007 [1] , first hosted on Wikispaces [2] . Due to that site closure [3] , it moved to its present new host at www.chessprogramming.org . We hope you like the work we have done. Mark Lefler and the rest of the CPW team.
